entry.title: lissy93 commented on an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/dashy#2145 · May 17, 2026 10:15
lissy93 commented May 17, 2026
The most secure option though is going to be to put your own auth on the reverse proxy which sits in front of Dashy

entry.title: lissy93 commented on an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/dashy#2145 · May 17, 2026 10:08
